ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( ISNEW(), OR ( ISPICKVAL( Account.Compliance_Status__c, 'Rejected'), ISPICKVAL( Contracting_Account__r.Compliance_Status__c, 'Rejected'), ISPICKVAL( Billing_Account__r.Compliance_Status__c, 'Rejected') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot create a new Opportunity for an Account with Rejected Compliance Status.
